sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61467" key="labropo/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαβρο-πόδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n61467.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rapid of foot, rushing</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χείμαρρε</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.277</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
